content.full_text:
Kathryn A. Marler/Dawna M. Nerhus  
613 West Valley Parkway, Suite 225  
Escondido, CA 92025  
(619) 489-2335  
(619) 489-2714 FAX

MEMORANDUM

DATE: July 18, 1990  
TO: Ms. Blanca Breeze  
Counsel, Legal Division  
FPPC  
FROM: Dawna M. Nerhus  
Kathryn A. Marler  
Candidates for School Board  
Escondido Union School District  
RE: Formation of a Recipient Committee

Dear Ms. Breeze:

Thank you for taking time from your busy schedule to speak with us yesterday.

The purpose of this correspondence is to confirm our discussion.

As we discussed, the formation of a committee named "Friends of Kathy Marler and Dawna Nerhus" meets the guidelines set forth by the FPPC provided it is a committee governed by an independent group of individuals, with both candidates having no control over the funds or actions of said committee.

This committee is entitled to print brochures, signs etc. containing reference to both candidates for the upcoming November election.

In addition, this committee would be entitled to accept contributions made payable to "Friends of Kathy Marler and Dawna Nerhus" not to exceed $1,000 from any individual.

Kindly confirm that this information is accurate and forward such confirmation to us at your earliest possible convenience. Sending your response via facsimile at the above referenced number would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your assistance and guidance.

Sincerely,

Dawna M. Nerhus  
Kathryn A. Marler
